violations.text: Dumped coffee grounds were observed in the front sandwich prep area hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Coffee grounds were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

At the time of inspection, the cold drawer unit lower left drawer and the milk low boy cooler were observed in need of adjustment(s). Both were observed not properly sealing/fully closing when closed. Equipment is to be adjusted or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
